Operation 'GetLatestAggregatedInvocationsStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is vague about what 'aggregated' means and lacks domain context. Description is completely empty, providing no guidance for AI agents. Improved version clarifies that this retrieves mock invocation metrics, specifies the return type (DailyInvocationStatistic objects), explains the 'days' parameter purpose, and indicates the use case for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Get aggregated invocations statistics for latest days
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aggregated invocation statistics for mock services across the latest days. Returns daily invocation metrics including invocation counts and timestamps. The number of days included in the aggregation is controlled via the 'days' query parameter. Useful for monitoring mock service usage patterns and performance trends.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about what 'aggregated' means and lacks domain context. Description is completely empty, providing no guidance for AI agents. Improved version clarifies that this retrieves mock invocation metrics, specifies the return type (DailyInvocationStatistic objects), explains the 'days' parameter purpose, and indicates the use case for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'GetLatestTestResults' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic and lacks domain specificity. Description is empty, providing no context for AI agents. Improved version clarifies that this retrieves test execution results (not just test definitions), specifies the return type (TestResult objects), explains the 'limit' parameter, and details what information is included in the results for better AI agent interpretability and decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the latest test execution results for services and APIs. Returns TestResult objects containing test outcomes, timestamps, and associated test case results. The number of results returned is controlled via the 'limit' query parameter. Includes information about test status, execution duration, and individual test case outcomes for each service test run.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and lacks domain specificity. Description is empty, providing no context for AI agents. Improved version clarifies that this retrieves test execution results (not just test definitions), specifies the return type (TestResult objects), explains the 'limit' parameter, and details what information is included in the results for better AI agent interpretability and decision-making.

message: Operation 'DeleteImportJob' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Original summary and description are too generic. Added context about what gets deleted, clarified that the job definition is removed, explained the side effect (polling stops), and clarified that imported artifacts persist. This helps AI agents understand the scope and consequences of deletion.

data.summary_suggestion: Remove an ImportJob from the repository
data.description_suggestion: Deletes an ImportJob from the Microcks repository by its ID. This operation removes the job definition and stops any scheduled polling for that job. The associated mock definitions and tests previously imported by this job remain in the repository.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic. Added context about what gets deleted, clarified that the job definition is removed, explained the side effect (polling stops), and clarified that imported artifacts persist. This helps AI agents understand the scope and consequences of deletion.

message: Operation 'ActivateImportJob' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needed expansion to explain the scheduling behavior, what happens when activated (polling begins), and what is returned. This provides better context for AI agents to understand the operational effect.

data.current_description: Make an ImportJob active, so that it is executed
data.description_suggestion: Activates an ImportJob to enable scheduled polling and execution. When activated, the job will execute according to its configured schedule to import mock definitions and tests from the specified repository. Returns the updated ImportJob with active status.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needed expansion to explain the scheduling behavior, what happens when activated (polling begins), and what is returned. This provides better context for AI agents to understand the operational effect.

message: Operation 'StartImportJob' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear. Description had a typo ('immediatly') and lacked clarity about what gets imported (both mocks and tests per API context). Added information about bypassing schedule and return value for better AI agent understanding of the operation's effect.

data.current_description: Starting an ImportJob forces it to immediatly import mock definitions
data.description_suggestion: Triggers an immediate execution of an ImportJob to import mock definitions and tests from its configured repository, bypassing the normal schedule. Returns the updated ImportJob with execution status and results.
